steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
All three terms are multiples of $x^5$, so combine only the coefficients:
$$18x^5+21x^5-11x^5=(18+21-11)x^5$$

steps.title: Find the coefficient
steps.content:
Compute the coefficient:
$$18+21-11=28$$
So the expression is $28x^5$, meaning $b=28$. The answer is 28.
